title: copaifera depilis
intro: Copaifera depilis, also known as Copaiba tree, is a species of tree native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The tree's resin, which contains a high concentration of beta-caryophyllene, has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Copaifera depilis include wound healing, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Copaifera depilis is often prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or cream, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
